name: chearmstrong-skills
description: Portable personal coding-agent skills for code review, maintainability, architecture checks, cost estimation, commit messages, and review-comment workflows.

interface.longDescription: Use these skills for repository review, review-comment handling, maintainability checks, architecture compliance, cost estimation, and commit-message drafting.
defaultPrompt: Review this repository for maintainability issues.
Estimate the AWS and LLM cost-to-serve for this repository.
Draft a conventional commit message for my current changes.
